reviews.review_msg: Be prepared to fail. Teaches too fast. Doesn't explain clearly.

Jillian is a good prof. She cares about her students and is always accessible for extra help. The clicker questions helped me a lot with understanding the lecture materials. As long as you attend lectures /tutorials, do your homeworks, and keep up with the class you'll be fine!

Took a 300 level selected topics class with her on the philosophy of biology couple years ago. Demonstrates a genuine passion for philosophy. Fairly clear in her explanations and the syllabus was woven together in a progressive manner culminating in several contemporary discussions in the philosophy of evolutionary theory. Tough grader though.

I felt that Jillian did a fantastic job conducting a class on Phil of Sport although it was her first time. Undoubtedly, Jillian was a hard marker; however, she was also a fair marker who was willing to help her students understand course material. If you'd really like to benefit from taking a course with Jillian, be prepared give it your best.

Worst class I have ever taken. Enrolled  to fill out a requirement thinking a 100 level course would be simple. THIS WAS HARDER THAN 3rd YEAR CLASSES! Testing is complex and lectures are confusing. Do not take this class!

i am not native english speaker.my first time  of phil100 was D. then i retake. this time is Jill. i deep read all materials,  collorate with TAs who mark the papers. then i got A-. if u start to like the subject, u will get good mark. dont rely on course notes,but on readings, they r hard to understand but they give u high grades
Avoid this prof at all costs, GPA downer.. super curved class with failing averages.

The prof is a nice enough person, but I was very disappointed with her teaching. Provides partially filled pdfs that we you can take notes on, but she does not give enough time to take notes. Hardly writes, just talks. No tutorials to speak of. I think this course is just a cashcow because of BUS students. Avoid at all costs. I am very upset!!!

Worst class ever. She's  a terrible prof with bad taste in music. Avoid this class and her if you can. It is a nightmare and a torture just to withstand her lectures. Plus the midterm and final were so difficult that she had to scale the marks just so half the class wouldn't fail. Not to mention she ridicules the class if we don't understand.
